title: Search Through The Night

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Wandering these city streets alone
Every shadow holds a memory of you
Past the guards, through the neon glow
Searching every corner, breaking through

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: My heart won't rest until I find
The one who sets my soul alive

sections.label: Chorus
lines: I found the one my heart's been seeking
Won't let you go, now that you're here
Through darkest nights, I kept believing
Love led me home, crystal clear
(My love, my dove, you're finally here)

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Through the marketplace at midnight
Down the alleys, calling out your name
City lights are burning bright
But nothing burns like love's sweet flame

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: My heart won't rest until I find
The one who sets my soul alive

sections.label: Chorus
lines: I found the one my heart's been seeking
Won't let you go, now that you're here
Through darkest nights, I kept believing
Love led me home, crystal clear
(My love, my dove, you're finally here)

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Like a queen upon her throne of gold
Carried high on pillars of desire
Our love story will be told
Through streets of peace and fields of fire

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Like smoke rising in the morning light
Like myrrh and incense in the night
Our love is pure, our love divine
Two hearts forever intertwined

sections.label: Chorus
lines: I found the one my heart's been seeking
Won't let you go, now that you're here
Through darkest nights, I kept believing
Love led me home, crystal clear
(My love, my dove, you're finally here)

sections.label: Outro
lines: Now that I've found you
I'll never let you go
(Never let you go)

epigraph: By night on my bed I sought him whom my soul loveth
lyricEyebrow: From the Book of Song of Songs
